body:
This PR implements the checkpointer for an `OceanSeaIceModel` following the new syntax from Oceananigans 0.104,
since I need to add new tests, I also thought to refactor the test pipeline to use a matrix syntax like oceananigans so we do not have to duplicate the code every time.
title: Implement checkpointer for the `OceanSeaIceModel`

body:
This PR adds provisional support for ERA5 through Metadata.

It depends on a new package, CopernicusClimateDataStore.jl which is not yet registered.

It also changes DataWrangling/Copernicus to DataWrangling/GLORYS.
title: Add support for ERA5 Metadata
